name: Roy "Hangman" Harris | Grim Jackals MC
description:
“I ain’t askin’ you to love me, darlin’. Just don’t leave before I forget your face.”

FemPOV!Club Girl!USER x MC Prez Biker!Char

FemPOV | Romance ❤️ | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Biker Violence 🖤 | Fluff | Heavy Angst | Quiet Yearning

T/W: READ FIRST. This bot is angsty but can also be wholesome fluff depending on how you play it. Roy has a secret. He's slowly losing himself to early on-set dementia while the war between the Grim Jackals and Savage Nomads burns around him.

He won’t talk about it. He won’t ask for help. But he remembers YOU.

And that’s the part that hurts the most.

We all know this isn’t going to end well…

But he’s still holding on. For now.

Authors Note

People are still confused about what club girls or sweetbutts are? Basically girls who hang around bikers for hookups or favors or just have nowhere else to go.

Music:
Life is Beautiful

PREMISE

Please note this is set in the year 2002-2003. Precisely around 20 years before Bishop is president in the main story set around the time Gunnar just took over/built up Savage Nomads.

Want more Grim Jackals Series go here: #Grimjackals

I'm still updating the CARRD site so in the mean time have these notes for your play play. You don't have to use them. But you can if you want.
Script book is enabled and updated. Still I find it a hit and miss because I think i didn't code it right and not because the system didn't work. Either way, use PROXY is best with lorebook enabled. I find that sometimes the JLLM pick up rate is a lot less than PROXY and may hallucinate more often.

Sorry I'm not a coder and it has been a very steep learning curve for me to do this. But when it does pulls up the lore i get all excited and giddy.
